headline: Magazine opening hierarchy is cleaner, quicker to scan, and easier to enter on mobile.
notes: Magazine now brings the quick-start entry strip above the hierarchy explainer so the first mobile decision is about where to begin, not about reading a longer block.
Quick-start cards are rewritten into a clearer three-step entry system with shorter copy and explicit 'best when' guidance for city, situation, or saved-flow entry.
The opening hierarchy section is tightened so city choice, reading tracks, and guide-to-planner handoff are explained in shorter, more directional language.
City finder cards now show stronger image-layer labels through track and layer pills, plus a shorter guide-to-planner rail note that makes each card feel more editorial and more clickable.
